industry.title: BioDrone
industry.description: Worked with Biodrone, a Norway-based company specializing in advanced drone services and AI-driven aerial image analysis for forestry and agricultural applications. Contributing to the development and integration of machine learning models within the Biodrone Portal.
metrics: ML model integration for aerial image analysis
End-to-end pipeline on AWS with SageMaker and distributed training

industry.title: Dobee
industry.description: Worked with Dobee on a Generative AI project focused on building an intelligent and interactive story generation system. Designed an end-to-end pipeline to fetch raw data from BigQuery, use an AI model to generate insightful summaries and stories, and store the outputs in Firestore. Implemented a chatbot interface where users can provide additional context, allowing the system to regenerate more refined and context-aware stories dynamically.
metrics: Iterative context-aware content refinement via chatbot

industry.title: TicketCo Data
industry.description: Worked with TicketCo Data on a proof-of-concept project to develop a static rule engine designed to maximize ticket sales profit based on configurable business rules. Implemented a system leveraging NATS for real-time data streaming to publish and receive recommended ticket prices dynamically. Designed the architectural blueprint for a future dynamic AI-driven rule engine utilizing time series forecasting.
metrics: Real-time dynamic pricing via NATS streaming
Scalable architecture for future AI-driven pricing engine

industry.title: AquaRobotics
industry.description: Worked with Aqua Robotics, a Norway-based company providing robotic solutions for sea fish farming. Developed an image classification model for their underwater rover, addressing issues like overfitting and bias. Designed and implemented a GAN model to generate synthetic data, improving model performance. Integrated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub, Docker, and SageMaker Spot Instances, reducing training costs by up to 70%. Worked on distributed training to scale up training machines while minimizing cost.
metrics: Reduced training costs by up to 70% via Spot Instances
Synthetic data generation with GANs to improve model performance

industry.title: Blogging Website (Full-Stack)
industry.description: Built a full-stack blogging platform featuring JWT authentication for enhanced security. Users can create profiles, manage personal information, and securely update passwords. Registered users can create, update, and delete blogs, while all users can read and explore categorized blogs. Unit tests implemented for both frontend and backend components.
metrics: Full CRUD operations with role-based access
